tasks.name: Implement fixes with Codex
tasks.prompt: Implement the fixes listed in docs/audit.md, run the tests, and summarize what changed.

tasks.name: Write release notes with Gemini
tasks.prompt: Read the git log since the last tag and write RELEASE_NOTES.md.

tasks.name: Audit the project with Claude
tasks.prompt: Read the codebase and write a code-quality audit to docs/audit.md. List concrete issues with file paths. End with [[TASK_COMPLETE]] on its own line when done, or [[TASK_BLOCKED]] <reason> if you cannot finish.

tasks.name: Audit codebase with Copilot
tasks.prompt: Read the codebase and write a code-quality audit to docs/audit.md. List concrete issues with file paths. End with [[TASK_COMPLETE]] on its own line when done, or [[TASK_BLOCKED]] <reason> if you cannot finish.

tasks.name: Fix failing tests with CLI rotation (claude → codex → gemini)
tasks.prompt: Fix all failing tests. Run the test suite, identify each failure, apply targeted fixes, and verify everything passes. End with [[TASK_COMPLETE]] when all tests pass, or [[TASK_BLOCKED]] <reason> if genuinely blocked.
